auth-system.notes: Neon PostgreSQL backend with JWT sessions, bcrypt hashing

seo.notes: JSON-LD all pages, per-chapter OG images (31 PNGs + SVGs), Twitter cards, bot SSR, sitemap, feed.xml

build-reliability.notes: TypeScript strict, clean build, lazy loading, code splitting

israel-dossier.notes: 10x expansion, now also accessible as tab on homepage

content-packs.notes: 6 packs + brand kit with 10 SVG assets, accessible as homepage tab

dossier-pdf.notes: Full A4 PDF with cover page, TOC

print-styles.notes: Comprehensive @page margins, grayscale evidence, URL expansion

hubspot-pipeline.notes: All major pages wired, newsletter, exit-intent, content gate, SPA tracking

ecommerce-optimization.notes: Conversion tracking, social proof, sticky membership bar

chapter-pdf-export.notes: Per-chapter PDF with cover, evidence tiers, quotes

tabbed-record-page.notes: 6-tab layout with lazy loading, hash deep links

brand-kit.notes: 10 SVG assets downloadable from Content Packs tab

per-chapter-og.notes: 31 unique 1200x630 OG images, PNG via resvg, bot SSR injection

aipac-interactive-diagram.notes: SVG hemicycle, member popups with photos/donations/votes/lobbyist/contact

aipac-tab-integration.notes: Tab 5, journalism tabs grouped, globe icon, hash deep-link

community-forum.notes: UPGRADED: Full Reddit clone — 9 communities, threaded comments, voting, awards (10 types), polls, flairs, post types (text/link/poll), search, sort (hot/best/new/top/controversial/rising), community sidebars with rules/mods/stats, create post modal, community filtering, trending sidebar, mobile responsive with drawer nav. 10 seed posts, 6 seed comments. 68.6kB bundle.

full-width-layout.notes: NEW: All pages widened from max-w-5xl (1024px) to max-w-[1920px]. Header, footer, HomePage, DeepStatePage, IsraelDossierPage, AipacDiagram, ContentPackPage, MembershipPage all updated. Responsive padding (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8).

power-profiles-system.notes: NEW: 235+ detailed profiles of politicians, billionaires, lobbyists, intel, media, and corporate figures. Each profile: sourced claims with evidence tiers, donation history (FEC data), policy actions, network connections, quotes, career timeline. ProfilePage with collapsible sections, tier badges, related profiles. ProfilesIndexPage with search, category filters, sort, responsive grid. Routed at /profiles and /profile/:slug.

power-profiles-data.notes: NEW: 15 detailed + 85+ abbreviated profiles. Top figures: Cruz ($2.1M AIPAC), Trump ($200M+ Adelson), Gates (Epstein docs), Soros ($32B OSF), Kushner ($2B Saudi PIF), Schumer ($3.4M pro-Israel), Pelosi, McConnell, Maxwell, Epstein, Dershowitz, Wexner, Prince Andrew. All sourced to FEC, OpenSecrets, Congress.gov, PACER, SEC.
